hyperedges.label: Quality signal aggregation in HeuristicChecker
Shared LLM provider call helpers used by ASR-correction/translation/summary
End-to-end webui transcription flow
all backends implement Transcriber and are instantiated by factory
research pipeline orchestrates search→date-filter→match→llm-screen→transcribe→history
anchor language picking uses script detection over candidate languages
subscribes update — fetch+filter+transcribe+analyze+state
analyze step — source resolution, prompt build, LLM call, output write
Cross-OS schedule snippet generators (cron/launchd/systemd/Task Scheduler)
Vision backends (Gemini/Claude/OpenAI) implement VisionBackend protocol
Detection pipeline: triggers → matcher → window_merge → frame_diff/scene refinement
Preset resolution: registry defaults < builtin presets < user config < CLI overrides

hyperedges.label: Quality signal aggregation in HeuristicChecker
Shared LLM provider call helpers used by ASR-correction/translation/summary
End-to-end webui transcription flow
all backends implement Transcriber and are instantiated by factory
research pipeline orchestrates search→date-filter→match→llm-screen→transcribe→history
anchor language picking uses script detection over candidate languages
subscribes update — fetch+filter+transcribe+analyze+state
analyze step — source resolution, prompt build, LLM call, output write
Cross-OS schedule snippet generators (cron/launchd/systemd/Task Scheduler)
Vision backends (Gemini/Claude/OpenAI) implement VisionBackend protocol
Detection pipeline: triggers → matcher → window_merge → frame_diff/scene refinement
Preset resolution: registry defaults < builtin presets < user config < CLI overrides
